content:
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

I had the opportunity to develop the Darting Basketball Academy website, a platform designed to help athletes and parents easily explore basketball training programs, camps, leagues, and memberships. The goal was to create a modern, engaging website that reflects the academy’s passion for player development while making information easy to find.
The website includes 8+ pages, covering the Home, Programs, Who We Are, Contact, Membership, and other important sections for athletes and parents.
What I Delivered:

• Responsive WordPress website

• Clean and modern design

• Easy navigation for programs and registrations

• Fast-loading pages

• Mobile-friendly layout

• Simple content management for future updates
The final result is a professional website that helps the academy showcase its services, build trust with visitors, and provide a smooth browsing experience across all devices.
